'''Kheedar''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kheedar system/Legends|Kheedar system]].<ref name="CFTD">''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''</ref> It had [[hydrocarbon]] processing facilities.

==History==
The planet was ruled by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Gordan]], who supported the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], but the local underworld was controlled by the crime lord [[Horch]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces led by the [[Pestage (Victory-class)|''Pestage'']] subjugated the planet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], instituting martial law, which caused Gordan to denounce the New Order he had supported. During the invasion, Horch's criminal empire was taken over by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Noval Garaint]].<ref name="GG9" />
